title: Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol on an NP-Hard Problem: Does /goal help?
summary: The article compares Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol on an NP-hard problem, testing whether a /goal directive improves performance. It finds that explicit goal-setting enhances reasoning for both models, with Fable 5 showing notable gains in structured problem-solving.
